company.title: Company
company.description: Single company name to search for.

query_suffix.title: Query suffix
query_suffix.description: Keywords appended after the company name in the Google query.

results_per_page.title: Results per page
results_per_page.description: How many Google results to request per search page.

max_pages_per_query.title: Max pages per query
max_pages_per_query.description: Maximum number of Google result pages to fetch for the company query.

keyword_terms.title: Keyword terms
keyword_terms.description: Optional ESG-related keywords used to annotate the crawler output.

enable_fast_crawler.title: Enable fast crawler
enable_fast_crawler.description: Run 6sigmag/fast-website-content-crawler after Google search. Disabled by default.

enable_jina_ai.title: Enable Jina AI
enable_jina_ai.description: Fetch page content from jina.ai for each forwarded URL.

jina_api_key.title: Jina API key
jina_api_key.description: Optional jina.ai API key. If omitted, requests are attempted without authentication.

jina_engine.title: Jina engine
jina_engine.description: Choose which jina.ai engine to use.

jina_timeout_secs.title: Jina timeout
jina_timeout_secs.description: Timeout header passed to jina.ai in seconds.
